message:
🐛 Fix KubeCraft array bounds, remove ProwJobs debug logging, add search spacing (#697)

- Fix KubeCraft.tsx: Use Math.floor(GRID_SIZE / 3) to prevent float array indices
  that caused "Cannot set properties of undefined" errors in generateWorld()
- Remove ProwJobs debug console.log and unused isRefreshing/error variables
- Add mb-4 spacing to CardSearchInput for consistent gap below search inputs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -234,7 +234,7 @@ export function CardSearchInput({
   useEffect(() => () => clearTimeout(timerRef.current), [])
 
   return (
-    <div className={`relative ${className}`}>
+    <div className={`relative mb-4 ${className}`}>
       <Search className="absolute left-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-3.5 h-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
       <input
         type="text"
